tooltip_france: 100% French production. A French brand does not also appear in the Europe filter.
tooltip_europe: 100% European production outside France, including EU, UK, Switzerland, Norway and nearby countries.
tooltip_mixed: Brands with serious ethical efforts, but production is not exclusively European.
tooltip_eco: Brands with a recognized eco commitment, regardless of origin category.
preserve_notice: Your existing Vinted filters will be preserved and completed.
reset_confirm: Remove all brand and material filters from the current Vinted URL?
error_not_on_catalog: Start a Vinted search first, then enable filters.
error_no_valid_ids: The selected filters do not have Vinted IDs yet.
